description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Container Image Deployment CI (ML stack) that triggers on push events to tags robotoff-ml-deploy-net* and robotoff-ml-deploy-org*. Use a matrix strategy with ubuntu-latest to deploy to different environments (robotoff-ml-net and robotoff-ml-org) concurrently. For each environment, set common and specific variables, checkout the Git repository, set environment variables, start services with Docker Compose, check services are up, and clean up obsolete Docker objects.
